## Project
- **Owner:** Saurav Raghuvanshi (Digital Cloud Solution Architect @ Microsoft)
- **Stack:** Next.js 16 App Router ¬∑ TypeScript ¬∑ Tailwind v4 ¬∑ Framer Motion
- **Live:** https://saurav-portfolio.azurewebsites.net
- **Repo:** https://github.com/sauravraghuvanshi/portfolio
- **Local:** `C:\Users\sraghuvanshi\Downloads\My-Projects\Portfolio Website\portfolio\`

## Session Start Protocol (AUTOMATIC ‚Äî do this FIRST before anything else)

At the **very start of EVERY new session**, before responding to any user request:

1. **Read full project context:** Read `.claude/project-memory.md` ‚Äî contains architecture, routes, infra, last session state, and remaining roadmap
2. **Read lessons:** Read `.claude/lessons.md` ‚Äî 53+ learned rules from past mistakes (NEVER repeat these)
3. **Read code patterns:** Read `.claude/patterns.md` ‚Äî exact code templates for components, APIs, admin CRUD, MDX, streaming. Follow these patterns for all new code.
4. **Read architecture:** Read `.claude/architecture.md` ‚Äî architecture decisions and rationale. Don't "fix" intentional design choices.
5. **Brief the user:** Say: "Context loaded ‚Äî [one-line summary of where we left off]. Remaining: [top 3 items from roadmap]"
6. If user has a task, proceed. If not, suggest the highest-priority remaining item.

## Session End Protocol (AUTOMATIC ‚Äî do this before ending ANY session)

Before the session ends or when the user says "done", "that's all", "push", or signals session end:

1. **Update `project-memory.md`** ‚Äî Update the "Last Session Summary" section with: date, what was completed, changed files, last commit hash, what's next
2. **Update `lessons.md`** ‚Äî If ANY corrections were made or new patterns discovered, add new lessons
3. **Update `patterns.md`** ‚Äî If new code patterns were established
4. **Update `architecture.md`** ‚Äî If any architecture decisions were made or changed
5. **Update `README.md`** ‚Äî If notable features added/changed
6. **Commit message format:** `feat:` / `fix:` / `chore:` / `docs:` prefix, concise description

## Key Rules (from lessons.md ‚Äî most critical)

- **Never edit `events.json` directly** ‚Äî use `events-overrides.json`
- **Tailwind:** Full-string lookup maps for dynamic classes, never interpolate
- **Never start dev server** ‚Äî tell user to run `npm run dev` themselves
- **Push only after approval** ‚Äî never push until user confirms localhost looks good
- **Set Azure env vars BEFORE pushing code** that depends on them
- **Build check:** Run `NEXT_TURBOPACK=0 npx next build` after non-trivial changes
- **Auth:** `ManagedIdentityCredential` on production (detected via `WEBSITE_SITE_NAME`), `AzureCliCredential` on local
- **No console.log in production** ‚Äî use `const log = isDev ? console.log : () => {};`
- **Zod validation** at API boundaries ‚Äî schemas in `lib/api-schemas.ts`
- **SCM auth check before push:** `az rest --method get` to verify `basicPublishingCredentialsPolicies/scm`
- **Testimonials are removed** ‚Äî company compliance, do not add back

## Content Pipeline
- Blog: MDX in `content/blog/` ‚Äî admin panel or manual
- Case Studies: MDX in `content/case-studies/`
- Projects: `content/projects.json`
- Talks: `content/talks.json`
- Events: Auto-generated from DOCX ‚Üí `events.json`, overrides in `events-overrides.json`
- Certifications: `content/certifications.json`

## CI/CD
```
git push origin main ‚Üí GitHub Actions ‚Üí build ‚Üí zip .next/standalone/ ‚Üí Kudu zipdeploy
```

## Deploy Verification Protocol (MANDATORY)
> **Never tell the user "it works" until the full chain is green.**

```bash
# End-to-end (preferred):
npm run ship                    # lint ‚Üí verify:local ‚Üí push prompt ‚Üí watch:deploy ‚Üí verify:live

# Or run phases individually:
npm run verify:local            # spawns `npm run dev`, smoke-tests key routes, kills dev
npm run watch:deploy            # polls deploy.yml via GitHub API until completed (exits non-zero on failure)
npm run verify:live             # smoke-tests https://saurav-portfolio.azurewebsites.net
npm run verify:deploy           # runs verify:local + watch:deploy + verify:live
```

Smoke routes (default): `/`, `/blog`, `/projects`, `/events`, `/talks`, `/community`, `/resume`, `/social`, `/case-studies`, `/sitemap.xml`, `/robots.txt`, `/feed.xml`. Override with `ROUTES=a,b,c`.

Any failure ‚Üí fix ‚Üí re-run ‚Üí only then confirm to the user.
